title: GPSR fallback ordering in mesh-local routing: Rust GPSR-first vs Python GPSR-if-no-LOADng vs C never
description: Python router.py:478-486: GPSR only when loadng is None. Rust lichen-node/src/hybrid.rs:246-250: GPSR tried BEFORE queueing for LOADng, always. C routing/router.c:177-192: GPSR never invoked in the route path ('ponytail' comment :188); result QUEUE (LOADng) else DROP. Identical packet + state yields FORWARD (Rust) vs QUEUE (Python) vs DROP (C). Landed coordinated in 6913dc3529, drifted since. Decide the fallback policy (position-based forwarding preference vs route-request queueing) and align.
